title: Ebenus ovalifolia
intro:

Ebenus, also known as Ebenus persica, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. The health benefits of Ebenus are associated with its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
